title: proxy_chat_completions is a 308-line God function violating SRP
description:
Dimension: Structural Modularity / SRP / Cognitive Readability

Location: src/proxy.rs lines 583-890 (function proxy_chat_completions, with prepare_request_context above at 444-581).

Violation: Single function performs at least 9 distinct responsibilities: (1) JSON body parsing, (2) provider selection + API key extraction, (3) session increment bookkeeping, (4) context preparation via prepare_request_context, (5) per-request compactor cloning/configuration, (6) compaction with hint, (7) token estimation + turn metrics + threshold warnings, (8) streaming/thinking request transform + stream_options injection, (9) forwarding, (10) token-usage extraction, (11) VDD adversarial review with four-arm Response rebuild. Estimated cyclomatic complexity well over 15 (nested matches on VddResult, if-let chains, error branches). The presence of allow(clippy::too_many_lines) at line 442 is an explicit SRP violation suppression. Cognitive reading is interrupted by multiple scoped lock blocks (lines 610, 633, 714, 776, 807, 843) that are non-linear.

Mandated Refactor: Extract five helpers and call them in sequence:
  1. resolve_provider returning provider_name, provider_config, api_key — replaces lines 597-607.
  2. async compact_if_needed — owns compactor model-cloning and actual_token_hint logic (lines 621-685).
  3. async record_turn_estimate — owns all token estimation, system_prompt_tokens, tool_def_tokens, warn-threshold notification (lines 691-769).
  4. async transform_and_forward — request transform plus stream_options injection plus forward (lines 771-801).
  5. async apply_vdd — VDD dispatch pattern-matched ONCE, handles Response::from_parts reassembly internally (currently reassembled 4 times in lines 822-882).
After extraction, proxy_chat_completions should be 40-60 lines and the allow(clippy::too_many_lines) attribute must be deleted.
